Once Upon a Time in the West

C'era una volta il West

"There were three men in her life. One to take her… one to love her —and one to kill her."

8.3
1968MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

As the railroad builders advance unstoppably through the Arizona desert on their way to the sea, Jill arrives in the small town of Flagstone with the intention of starting a new life.

Tags

small townloss of loved oneharmonicawedding partyspaghetti westernarizona territoryintercontintental railroadoutlaw gangwater pumpmysterious characterboom townrailroad companyhope for a new liferailroad constructiontechniscope
